verses.text: “Israel minamte tungah piak dingin leitang a kihawm ciangin, Topa' tanh dingin seh khat kituamkoih ding hi. Tua a kituamkoih leitang pen a dung tai sawm hi ding a, a vai tai giat hi ding hi. Tua sung khempeuh a siangtho biakna leitang hi ding hi
Hih leitang sung panin biakinn ding tawh kisai-in a dung pi za giat sawmli, a vai pi za giat sawmli mah kisehin, tua banah a kimkot pi sawmgiatli paisuak mun awng tawh hi lai ding hi
Hih biakna leitang siangtho sung panin siangtho pen mun leh biakinn mun dingin a saulam tai sawm, a zailam tai li kisehkhia ding hi

Hih a kisehkhia mun sungteng pen biakna leitang siangtho hi ding a, Topa' biakinn sungah na a sem siampite-a' ding hi ding hi. Hih mun sungteng pen siampite' inn lamna ding mun leh biakinn lamna ding mun siangtho hi ding hi
Hih banah, a dung tai sawm, a vai tai li a pha sehkhat kibawl leuleu ding a, biakinn sungah na a sem Levi mite-a' ding hi ding hi. Tua sungtengah amaute' ten'na ding khua om ding hi
Khuapi huangsung dingin a dung tai sawm, a vai tai nih a pha leitang khat kisehkhia ding hi. Hih mun pen a siangtho leitang tawh kizom pah ding a, Israel mite khempeuh-a' ding hi ding hi

“Gamsung a uk uliante-a' dingin zong leitang kisehkhia ding hi. A siangtho leitang leh khuapi huang panin kipanin nitumna lamah a gamgi ciang, nisuahna lamah zong a gamgi ciang mah hi ding a, nitumna pan nisuahna gamgi pen Israel minamte khat in a ngahzah tan mah hi ding hi

Hih munteng pen Israel gamsung panin Israel uliante' neih hi ding hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in Israel mite bawlsia nawnlo ding uh a, mun a omlaiteng khempeuh, a minam zui-in Israel minamte a tangsak ding uh hi

“Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel a uk uliante aw, na mawh gamtatna uh sauveizo lua ta hi. Na ngongtatnate uh leh mi na nen'niamnate uh khawl un la, thuman thutangin na sem un. Amau' leitang panun ka mite notkhia nawn kei un. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong gen hi
“Mi khempeuh in tawisuang man leh tehna man zang ding uh hi
An tehna bung leh tui tehna bung kikim ding a, a kizang ding etkakna pen beem hi ding hi. Beem khatah an bung sawm, tui bung sawm mah hi ding hi
A gik tehna pen, gerah sawmnih ciang shekel khat, shekel sawmguk ciangin mina khat hi ding hi.
“Biakna na piakna ding zia uh pen, mangbuh na neihzah uh pan sawmguk-ah khat, mangbuhham zong sawmguk-ah khat mah
sathau na neihzah uh sung pan seh za-ah khat (bung tawh tehin bung sawm ciangin beem khata seh

tuu na neih sung uh panin za nih ciangin khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen an tawh biakna, meihal biakna, thunuama biakpiaknate hi a, na mawhnate uh a maitheihna ding ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong pia hi
Israel mi khempeuh in hihte pen biakna-in a piak dingin, amau a uk ulianpa tungah puak ding uh hi

Gam uk ulianpa in biakna-in piak ding ganhingte, an tawh biakna-in zat dingte, leh pawi khempeuh, Khadet ni, Sabbath nite-in Israel mibuppite-a' dingin tuiphih biaknate a piak ding ama nasep ahi hi. Israel mite' mawhna a maitheihna dingin mawhna hanga biakna, an tawh biakna, meihal biakna, leh thunuama biakpiakna-in a zat dingte khempeuh amah in a si ding ahi hi
“Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Kha khatna a ni masa ni-in paubaan'na a omlo bawngtal khat biakna-in pia-in biakinn a siangsak ding na hi uh hi
Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakpiakna ganhing si pawlkhat la-in biakinn kongkhuamte, biakna tau ki lite, leh tual sungnung lutna kong khuamte nuh ding hi
Tua bangmahin tua kha a ni sagih ni-in zong, tuplohpi leh theihlohna hangin a khialkha mite-a' dingin sian'suahna a bawl ding na hi uh hi. Tu-a bang danin biakinn a siangthosak ding na hi uh hi
“A kha masa a ni sawmleli ni-in Paisan Pawi na kipan ding uh a, mi khempeuh in ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi
Tua pawi bawl a kipat ni-in gam uk ulianpa in amah leh mi khempeuh-a' dingin mawhna hanga biakpiakna-in bawngtal khat pia ding hi

Tua pawi ni sagih sung nisimin paubaan'na a omlo bawngtal sagih leh tuutal sagih la-in Topa tungah meihal biakna-in pia ding a, tua banah mawhna hanga biakna-in nisimin keeltal khat zong a pia ding ahi hi
Bawngtal leh tuutal a kipiazah tawh kizui-in an tawh biakna dingin an bung khat pai leh sathau bing khat pai tawh piakhawm ding hi

“A kha sagihna a ni sawmlenga ni-in nipikal khat sung a kibawl ding Buk Pawi kipan ding a, mawhna hanga biakpiakna, meihal biakna, leh an tawh biakna-in piak dingin an leh sathaute, nisimin a kisamzah, gam uk ulianpa in pia ding hi.
